rationale.partitions: 24 partitions support 2,000 events/sec with headroom and allow parallel HP connector tasks
rationale.replication_factor: 3 for HA in production; use 1 for local development
rationale.retention.ms: 72-hour (3-day) retention for replay window during connector recovery scenarios
rationale.compression.type: zstd for end-to-end compression (producer → broker → HP connector → Snowflake)
rationale.min.insync.replicas: 2 ensures durability guarantee when producer uses acks=all

rationale.partitions: 24 partitions match payments.auth for apples-to-apples throughput comparison with V3 connector
rationale.replication_factor: 3 for HA in production; use 1 for local development
rationale.retention.ms: 72-hour retention matches payments.auth for consistent replay window
rationale.min.insync.replicas: 2 ensures durability guarantee when producer uses acks=all

production.note: Production systems should use per-environment topics for isolation. Current demo uses a single topic with logical env separation via the 'env' field in each event.
